name: dependabot-rollup
description: Roll every open Dependabot security PR (excluding semver-major bumps) into one branch + PR, drive it to green CI, and close the superseded individual PRs. Repo-agnostic and safe to run unattended LOCALLY (e.g. a Desktop scheduled task). Not runnable as a cloud routine — the Claude GitHub App can't read Dependabot alerts. Requires github-ops.
